description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:27-cli Docker image with a docker:27-dind service and sets DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR to /certs. Define two stages, build and deploy, and a before_script that installs OpenJDK 21 JRE via apk and runs docker info. In the build stage add a job named build that runs ./gradlew build and is excluded from the main branch (except: main). In the deploy stage add a job named "build and deploy" that runs ./gradlew push --continue, runs only on the main branch, and deploys to the GitLab Docker registry for JOSM using an environment with the appropriate URL. No caches or artifacts are defined.
